title: KOLASIBAH DISTRICT TASK FORCE ON IMMUNIZATION LEH DISTRICT TB FORUM TE THUKHAWM
content:
4710/2025-2026

Kolasib, 5th March, 2026:Vawiin chawhnu khan DC Conference Hall, Kolasib-ah Bawrhsap Pu Robert C. Lalhmangaiha kaihhruaina hnuaiah District Task Force on Immunization leh District TB Forum te chu an thukhawm. He thutkhawmnaah hian HPV Vaccination Campaign (Chhul hmawr cancer hri danna) leh TB dona kawnga hmalak tawhnate thlirho niin, hmalak zel dan tur presentation pek leh sawiho a ni.

Thutkhawm kaihruaitu Kolasib Bawrhsap chuan Health Department-te chungah lawmthu sawiin, presentation-a tarlan atangin an hmalaknate chu fakawm a tih thu a sawi a. Target-te an tum anga an hlen chhuah theih lohna chhan pawh thawktute inthlahdah vang emaw tan lak tawk loh vang ni lovin, chhan tha tak tak a awm hlawm vang a ni, a ti. Health Department hmalakna hrang hrangte chu tha taka thlawp a, thawhpui a pawimawh thu a sawi bawk.

Bawrhsap chuan Kolasib District chhunga target achieve lohna chhan pakhatah Bru Community leh Internally Displaced People (IDP) te an awm chu pawi a tih thu sawiin, heng mite tan hian hei ai nasa zawka tan lak a ngai a ni, a ti a. Immunization leh hriselna kawnga sawrkar hmalakna hrim hrimah mi zawng zawng an tel vek theih nan mahni zawn theuhvah tan kan lak a ngai takzet a ni, a ti.

Thutkhawmnaah hian HPV Vaccination Campaign (Chhul hmawr cancer laka invenna) chungchang sawiho niin, Kolasib District huam chhungah target 916 an awm thu tarlan a ni. February ni 28 khan Kolasib District huam chhunga Urban PHC leh PHC hrang hrangah kum 14 tling tawh, kum 15 la tling lo hmeichhe naupang mi 131 te hnenah he vaccine hi pek an nih thu tarlan a ni a. HPV Vaccine hi target atanga a chanve chu Kolasib District-in an hlen chhuah tawh thu tarlan a ni bawk.

He thutkhawmah hian TB Mukt Bharat Abhiyan Phase-II kalpui dan tur pawh sawiho a ni a. Handheld X-Ray khawl hmanga TB vei rinhlelhte chu an khuaa kalchilha test vek tura ruahman a ni. Kolasib leh Vairengte-ah chauh TB diagnose-na hmun a awm avanga harsatna awm thinte sutkian dan tur chungchang sawiho a ni bawk.

Kolasib District huam chhungah hian TB natna vei an awm em tih hriat nan screening kalpui reng a ni a, kum 2025 chhung khan mi 12,085 zet screen an ni. Vawiin thutkhawmnaah hian March ni 24-a World TB Day hman tur denchhena kum 2025 chhunga 'TB Free Village' puante hnenah lawmman hlan an nih tur thu tarlan a ni. Vawiin vek khan Nikshay Mitra (TB natna veite ei leh in tura tanpuina) Rs. 700/- per month chu Bawrhsap leh DEO-ten an thehlut nghal a. Thutkhawmna ah hian Nikshay Mitra chu Class-I Officer chin chuan tih ngei nise tiin, a tam thei ang bera puanzar nise tih a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmnaah hian District Task Force on Immunization leh District TB Forum member-te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Model Code of Conduct enforced for Zemabawk West Local Council Bye-Election
content:
535/2025-2026

5th March, 2026 :In exercise of the powers conferred under sub-rule (1) of Rule 3 of the Mizoram Municipalities (Election to Local Councils) Rules, 2015 as amended, the State Election Commission, Mizoram hereby orders that Model Code of Conduct is enforced within VII/5 – Zemabawk West Local Council area with immediate effect till the Close of Poll on 25thMarc, 2026

title: LAWNGTLAI AH A VAWIKHATNA ATAN DISTRICT REGISTERING AUTHORITY CHU CLINICAL ESTABLISHMENT ACT (CEA) CHUNGCHANGAH THUTKHAWMNA NEIH A NI
content:
4709/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, the 5th March, 2026 :Vawiin chawhnu dar 1:30 pm khan DC's Office Chamber ah Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruaina in a vawi khatna atan District Registering Authority (DRA) - Clinical Establishment Act (CEA) chungchang ah thutkhawmna neih a ni.

Bawhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan member kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu a sawi a. Sawrkar laipui dan siam, The Clinical Establishments (Registration and Regulation) Act, 2010 beh chhanin Mizorama clinical establishment-te chhinchhiah, khuahkhirh leh vil zuina tur, The Mizoram Clinical Establishments (Registration and Regulation) Rules, 2014 chu Mizoramah hman a ni a. He dan hnuaiah hian damdawi in, clinic leh laboratory te chu DRA-ah an inziah luh (register) vek a, a him chin leh pawm theih chin (minimum standard) an phak ngei ngei a ṭul a. Chuti ang tur chuan Lawngtlai District-ah pawh hma lak chhoh zel ani ang a ti.

Dr. Lalmuanawma Jongte, Lawngtlai District Chief Medical Officer, chuan CEA thil tun chu ram puma damlo enkawlna hmun awm zat chhinchhiah a, tehfung mumal tak hmanga inenkawlna hmun him,rintlak leh belhchian dawl ni tura buatsaih leh an nih leh nih loh enfiah na tur anih thu te a sawi.

Dr.Rosalyn Sanghmingliani, District Level Coordinator, CEA, Lawngtlai chuan CEA hi mipui te an him zawk nan a pawimawh zia sawiin, mipui te pawh kan fimkhur a, CEA registration ti ngei, CEA certificate tar ngei Clinic leh Laboratory chauh pan nachang kan hriat a tul hle ani ati.

Meeting ah hian Clinical Establishment Act hnuaia in register theih dan te leh dan lo a ti te hrem theih dante sawi ho ani a. District Registering Authority in Permanent Registration dil thei chin te leh pek theih dan te sawiin, objection nei te tana complaints theihna hun pe in, objection a awm loh chuan inspection nei a endik hnuah, pek tlak ni a hriatte chu pek thin an nih tur thu an sawi. Vawiin meeting chuan dt.16/3/2026 ah inspection neih nise tiin a rel bawk a ni.

Lawngtlai District CMO Office-in an chhinchhiah danin, tun dinhmunah Lawngtlai District chhungah sawrkar hnuai ah- District Hospital -1, Primary Health Centre - 6, Community Health Clinic Centre -1 leh Community Health Centre 1 awm in, Non- Government ah- Kohhran Hospital - 2, Diagnostic Laboratories -9, Clinics - 8 leh Dental Clinics -3 a awm a ni. Lawngtlai District a Diagnostic Laboratories te hian Permanent Registration an dil mek a,kum-5 ralhma a renew zel tur a ni. Lawngtlai District a Clinics ho hi Provisional Registration nei vek an ni a, kum-1 ralhma a renew zel tur a ni bawk. Registration hi CMO & Convener, District Registering Authority, Lawngtlai District, Lawngtlai hnena dil tur a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawm ah hian District Registering Authority member te an tel kim hle a, Bawrhsap chuan lawmthu sawiin thutkhawm a ti tawp a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAIAH REVIEW MEETING OF MIZORAM CLEANLINESS COMPETITION 2025 RESULT LEH FAINA LEH SANITATION A LAWNGTLAI DINHMUN THLIR HONA NEIH A NI
content:
4708/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, the 5th, March, 2026 :Vawiin chawhma dar 11:00 AM khan Pu Donny Lalruatsanga, Lawngtlai Bawrhsap kaihhruaina in Mizoram Cleanliness Competition 2025 result review meeting leh Lawngtlai khawpui Faina leh Bawlhlawh paih dan chungchang thlir hona DC Conference Hall, Lawngtlai ah neih a ni.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu sawiin Mizoram Cleanliness Competion 2025 khawpui fai in elna atan Lawngtlai khawchhung ah pawh theih tawp chhuah a ni thu a sawi a.Chutih rualin Mizoram Cleanliness Competition,2025 result chhuak ah District 9 ah 8-na dinhmun kan hauh a, Lawngtlai hi faina kawngah kan tan zual a, thawhhona tha tak nen hmalak nasat a ngai a ni a ti. Kum kan hman mek ah pawh faina kawnga hmasawn zel tura thawk tur leh Lawngtlai District - a Mizoram Sawrkar department leh LADC sorkar chu thuneihna sangtak nei a nih vangin an ni nen tanho a pawimawh hle dawn a ni a ti.

He hun a tel LADC a Executive Member pahnih, LAD changtu Pu JB Vanhoy leh Sanitation & Waste Management enkawltu Pu Lalzahawma Chinzah te chuan Lawngtlai khawpui hmasawnna atan theihtawp chhuah an inhuam thu an sawi a, State Sorkar leh LADC in thawhdunna tha a neih phawt chuan hmalakna chu chaktaka kalpui a nih an beisei thu an sawi.

He hunah hian Pi Margaret J Vanlalremmawii, District Project Office & Member Secretary, Lawngtlai Town Sanitation Task Force leh Pu Lawmsangzuala, Sanitation Officer, LADC ten. Lawngtlai khawpuiin faina kawnga an hmalakna thlirletna neiin, hmasawnna leh hmachhawp an neihte tarlanna a nei nghal a ni.

Vawiin Lawngtlai Bawrhsap hova thutkhawm ah hian Mizoram a District khawpui intihsiakna ah dinhmun sang zawk luah thei turin theihtawp chhuah in State Sorkar leh LADC tangdunin, Village Council leh Tlawmngai pawl te nen kawngkal leh awmzenei zawkin hmalak nise tih a ni. Mipui lam ah awmzeneia faina leh thianghlimna kalpui tura inzirtirna uar zawka kalpui nise tha tih a ni bawk.

Vawiin review meeting ah hian sawrkar aiawh,  LADC Official, VCPs, NGOs aiawh leh MJA te an tel thei a a ni.

title: Chapchar Kut 2026 Khawzawl District-a hman dan tur relin Organising committee te thukhawm
content:
4707/2025-2026

Khawzawl, dated 5th March 2026:Vawiin chawhnu dar 2:30 khan DC Conference Hall, Khawzawlah Chapchar Kut 2026 Khawzawl District a hman dan tur chungchang relin Chapchar Kut 2026 Organising Committee te an thukhawm a, Khawzawl Bawrhsap, Pu K. Vanlalthiana’n a kaihruai.

Meeting in a rel danin Chapchar Kut 2026 hi Khawzawl Field No. 1-ah chawhma dar 11:00 am atanga hman tan tura rel a ni a, Kut Pa atan Er. H. Ginzalala, Adviser to CM (Technical)/MLA-23 Champhai North (ST) A/C niin, Kut thlengtu atan Pu PC. Rosiama, President, Sub-Hqrs YMA a ni ang. Kumin Chapchar kut Thupui atan “Zonun zemawi inremna” a ni ang a, he hunah hian hnam lam leh hnam zia rang lanna hrang hrang YMA Branch hrang hrang atangin en tir a ni ang a, heng bakah hian items hrang hrang te a awm bawk dawn a ni. Chapchar Kut pual hian ni 12 leh 13 chhun leh zan hian Event ropui tak buatsaih a ni ang.

Bawrhsap, Pu K. Vanlalthiana chuan kum danga NGO hrang hrang ten hun pui lo thena thahnem ngai taka an lo thawh tawhnaah lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, Khawzawl District-in hma a sawn zel theih nan member te'n theihtawp chhuah zel turin a sawm a. Vawiin meeting a ro an rel fel thei chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, hlim taka Chapchat Kut hman a nih ngei theih a beisei thu a sawi.

He hunah hian Chapchar Kut 2026 Organising committee te bakah, Special invitee, Pi Zirsangpuii (Miss Mizoram 2020) te an tel a ni.

title: MSSC leh LADC te’n Lawngtlaia Residential School inhlanna Memorandum of Agreement ziak
content:
4706/2025-2026

Aizawl, the 5th of March, 2026:Vawiin chawhnu dar 2:30 khan Mizoram State Sports Council leh Lai Autonomous District Council te chuan Residential School, Lawngtlai inhlanchhawnna tur Memorandum of Agreement chu MINECO a Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar, Minister of State, Sports & Youth Services Department, Office chamber-ah an ziak.

Lawngtlai a Residential School hi Pradhan Mantri Jan Vikas Karyakram (PMJVK) hnuaia MSSC jn Rs. 3461.7 lakh senga a sak a ni a. Inremnaah hian neitu nihna Leh a enkawl hna chu LADC kutah hlan niin, anni hian a enkawl leh hman zui chungchangah thu an nei dawn a ni. Inremna a thu dah zingah hian District Sports Committee (Lawngtlai), Mizoram Football Association, Lawngtlai District Football Association leh Central Young Lai Association(CYLA) ten state emaw district level tournament buatsaih nan an hman duh chuan man chawi lovin an hmang thei dawn a ni.

He hunah hian Sports Minister, MSSC President ni bawk Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan thu sawiin, “Lai mipuiten tangkai taka he Residential School hi an hman kan duh a, an hman ngei theih nan LADC kutah dah a ni. Mimal hlawkna emaw, politics khelh nan emaw a hmun leh bungruate hman leh laksawn phal a ni lo." tiin, thahnemngai leh duat taka enkawl turin LADC hruaitute chu a sawm nghal a ni.

MoA ziahnaah hian MSSC aiawhin Pu Henry C. Lalrawnkima, Secretary leh Amy Ramchhani, Administrative Officer te’n hming an ziak a. LADC aiawhin Pu K. Lalthanzara, Executive Secretary leh Pi Lalhminghlupuii Thangen, Deputy Resident Commissioner, Lai House, Aizawl te’n an hming an ziak ve bawk.

Attachment

title: Hmeichhia, harsatna tawk te tan FREE LEGAL PUBLIC HEARING neih a ni dawn
content:
4705/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 5th March, 2026:Kumin International Women’s Day ah hian Pi C. Zodinpuii, Chairperson, Mizoram State Commission for Women chuan Serchhipah hun a hmanpui dawn a. Hmeichhe dikna chanvo rahbehna hrang hrang tuar te chuan he hunah hian complain a thehluh theih dawn a ni.

Inchhungkhura hleilenna, eng kawng pawha tawk te, nupa kar harsatna avanga hmeichhe chunga tawrhna thleng te, hnathawhna hmuna thawhpui mipate atanga harsatna tawk te, chhaih nawmnah tawkte leh eng kawng pawha hmeichhia nihna avanga hleilenna leh nekchepna tawk tan harsatna a thlen theih ang.

Free Legal Public hearing neih tur a ni a, Complain hi theh luh theih a ni dawn a, thehlut duh te chuan District Programme Officer, WCD, Child Development Project Officer, WCD, Deputy Commissioner leh SP te hnen ah ziakin theh luh tur a ni.

Complain theh lut te tan he mi ni hian a rang thei ang bera an harsatna te chinfel nghal tum a ni.

title: INDIAN AIR FORCE (IAF) HNUAIA AIRMEN LAK RUNPUI (AIRMEN RECRUITMENT RALLY) NEIH TUR CHUNGCHANGAH MEETING
content:
4704/2025-2026

Aizawl; the 5th March, 2026:Vawiin khan  Aizawl DC Pisapui Hall-ah Aizawl bawrhsap  Er.Lalhriatpuia kaihhruaina hnuaiah Wg.Cdr. Muralidharan, Commanding Officer, 11 Airmen Selection Centre, Guwahati hovin  kan hmalawk  8th-13thMarch,2026 chhunga, Zokhawsang hmuna  IAF hnuaia  Airmen lak runpui ( Airmen Recruitment Rally) neih tur chungchangah meeting nei a ni.

Vawiin meeting-ah hian Mizoram sawrkarin Airmen la tu tura  Guwahati atanga lo kal, 11 Airmen Selection Centre, Guwahati official te, a tulna apianga lo puibawm , hma lo lakpui dan tur te rel niin, concern Department hrang hrang hnenah meeting chuan mawhphurhna chanvo a sem nghal a ni.

Vawiin meeting-ah hian Wg. Cdr. Lalrinsanga ,Commanding Officer, 1 Mizo Air Sqn. NCC,Mizoram chuan Airmen lak runpui(Recruitment Rally) hi kum 9  hnua an lak leh vawikhatna tur a ni a.  He Kum 9 kalta chhunga  IAF(Airmen)-a Mizo thalai lut thar tumah an awm loh avangin,tunah hian NCC AIR WING-ah Mizo instructor  tur pawh an khaih lek lek fo thin thu meeting-ah a tarlang.

Vawiin meeting chuan a tam thei ang ber a,he Airmen laknaah hian  Mizoram thalai te  tel turin a sawm.

He Airmen lak tur chungchanga hriat chian duh chuan a hnuaia link-ah hian en theih a ni e:https://agnipathvayu.cdac.in/AV/img/rallyDoc/AdvtAgniveervayu_01_of_26.pdf

Airmen Promotional Video clip:https://youtu.be/xuCkcPmi7Mw

title: ETC (SIRD&PR) Pukpuiah chawlhkar hnih awh Plumber (Nal Jal Mitra) training buatsaih a ni
content:
4703/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Vau thla ni 5:Public Health Engineering Department (PHED) Project Management Unit (PMU) leh State Institute of Rural Development & Panchayati Raj (SIRD&PR) ṭang kawp huaihawtin Lawngtlai District huam chhunga chengte tana Jal Jeevan Mission (JJM) hnuaia tui lak khawl vil leh enkawl hna (operation & maintenance) lam thawk thei tur Plumber (Nal Jal Mitra) training chawlhkar hnih awh chu Extension Training Centre (SIRD&PR) Pukpui, Lungleiah tluang taka buatsaih a ni.

Plumber training hi February ni 23 aṭanga March ni 5, 2026 chhung buatsaih niin, vawiin khan ETC Pukpuiah a kharna hun hman a ni a. SIRD&PR Director Pu R. Lalremsanga'n hun hmanpuiin, training chhuakte hnenah certificate a hlan a. Training chhuakte chu an thil zirte ṭangkai taka hmang a, ṭha taka thawk turin a chah.

Plumber training-ah Lawngtlai District aṭangin mi 42 telin, SIRD&PR Core Faculty Dr C. Lalthlansanga chuan training hi a pe a ni.

Attachment

title: EF&CC MINISTER-IN GREEN SKILL DEVELOPMENT PROGRAMME TRAINING KHARNA HUN HMANPUI
content:
4702/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 5th March, 2026 :Vawiin khan Mizoram Pollution Control Board (MPCB) hnuaia Mizoram Environmental Information, Awareness, Capacity Building and Livelihood Programme (EIACP) Hub buatsaih Green Skill Development Programme (GSDP) training ‘Certificate Course in Waste Optimization Professional’ kharna hun chu RB Mc Cable Hall, Aijal Club-ah hman a ni a. He hun hi Pu Lalthansanga, Minister, Environment Forest & Climate Change (EF&CC) Department chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Khuallian Pu Lalthansanga chuan Mizoramah ramngaw (forest cover) a tam bakah open forest a tam avangin sawrkar laipui atanga kan sum hmuh tur pawh a tam phah thu tarlangin, kan ramngaw leh nungchate humhalha, Mizoram hi ram fai leh thianglhima kan siam a pawimawh thu a sawi a. Kan ram faina leh boruak thianghlim hi khualzin hiptu lian tak a ni, a ti a. Bawlhhlawh atanga thil tangkai siamchhuah (Waste Optimization) hi thil pawimawh tak a nih thu sawiin, bawlhhlawh paih mai lova, thil tha leh tangkai tak tak siamchhuah kawnga hma lain, vawiina trainee zirchhuakte pawhin hemi kawngah hian hna an insiam thei dawn a ni, a ti a. Minister chuan training chhuak mi 20-te leh Resource Person mi 22-te hnenah Certificate hlanin, an kal lehzelna turah duhsakna a hlan a. Trainee-te chu an zir chhuah thiamnate eizawn nana hmang tangkai ngei turin a fuih bawk a ni.

GSDP training hi November ni 24, 2025 khan hawn tan niin tluang takin March ni 5, 2026 hian zawh fel a ni. He training kharna hi Pu Liankima Lailung, Chairman, MPCB chuan a kaihruai a, Pu Benjamin Lalnunsanga Colney, Programme Officer, Mizoram EIACP Hub chuan training chungchang report chipchiar takin a pe a, Resource Person leh Trainee-te aiawha thu sawi awm bawkin, Pu C. Lalduhawma, Member Secretary, MPCB chuan fuihna thuchah a sawi bawk a ni.

GSDP hnuaia training chhuakte chu lehkhathiam, graduate hna nghet nei lo emaw pawl 12 emaw pass chin, bawlhhlawh sâwngbâwl kaihhnawih lama kum 3 tal tawnhriat nei tawh an ni a, Resource Person atan hian Mizorama mithiam bikte an ruai a ni.

GSDP hi Skill India Mission leh Ministry of Environment, Forests & Climate Change (MoEF&CC) tangkawpin India ram State hrang hrangah a chhawpchhuak a, he programme hnuaiah hian lehkhathiam hna nei lo kum 18 chung lam tan Course hrang hrangah Training buatsaih niin, Mizoramah chuan Mizoram EIACP Hub-ten training hi an kalpui a ni.

Attachment

title: Mamit College-ah PMEGP Awareness Programme hman a ni
content:
4701/2025-2026

Dated : Mamit the 5th of March, 2026 :Vawiin khan Mamit College-ah PMEGP Awareness Programme hman a ni a,Khadi and Village Industries Commission (KVIC), Aizawl official-te’n an hman pui.

Pu Safiyan Hayath, KVIC Aizawl Executive chuan Power Point presentation hmangin PMEGP scheme kalphung leh a luh dan (implementation process leh entry procedures) a sawi a. PMEGP Scheme hnuaia hlawkna dawn theih dan leh a dil dante a sawifiah a, entrepreneur thar lo chhuak turte tan remchang awm theih dante a tarlang bawk.

Pi Lalthapuii, KVIC Aizawl Marketing Representative chuan mizoram chhunga thil siam leh service hrang hrangte hralh theihna leh an market chungchang a sawi a.PMEGP scheme hmanga mimal te'n business thar an tan theih dan leh hma an lak dan turte a sawi fiah bawk.

He hun hi college student-te zingah mahni kutkawiha eizawnna kawng leh PMEGP hnuaia puihna awmte hriattirna tura buatsaih a ni a. Zawhna leh chhanna hun hman niin, KVIC official-ten an chhang a ni.

Attachment

title: Serchhip EMRS a doctor rawih dan tur sawiho
content:
4700/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 5th March, 2026:Serchhip DC Pu Paul L Khuma hovin vawiin khan DC Meeting Hall-ah Eklavya Model Residential School (EMRS), Serchhip te mamawh doctor rawih dan tur mi pawimawhten an sawiho.

Eklavya Model Residential School (EMRS) hi Ministry of Tribal Affairs din niin Scheduled Tribe zirlai te tan, a thlawna lehkha an zirtheihna tura buatsaih a ni a. School leh Hostel fee, ei leh in leh an zirna kaihhnawih thil dang zawng zawng a thlawna pek an ni a. Hei bakah hian an hriselna endikna thlenga pek tur an nih avangin vawiin khan EMRS tana doctor rawih dan tur thuneituten an rel a ni.

Meeting chuan kar khatah vawih hnih zel EMRS, Serchhipa thu tur part time doctor rawih ni se, tiin an rel a. Doctor rawih chungchang hi EMRS inkaihhruainaa awmsa a nih avangin vawiina thurel te leh doctor a rawih man tur hi School neituten sawrkar laipui hnenah an hriattir leh dawn a ni.

Vawiin meeting ah hian EMRS hotute bakah Education officer, DIET Principal leh Serchhip Governmwnt College aiawh, DRDO Project Director leh mi pawimawh dangte an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: ANGLING EVENT-NGHAKUAI CHIAH RUNPUI BUATSAIH DAWN
content:
4699/2025-2026

5th March, 2026 :Vawiin khan Fisheries Department Secretary Er.Lalrothanga hovin Fisheries Department, Sihhmui Branch YMA leh Mizoram Angling Association hoten kum 2026 a a hmasa ber atan Angling Event-Nghakuai Chiah Runpui neih dan tur an rel a. Sihhmui Nghakuai Chiah Runpui hi March ni 20-21, 2026 chhungin Tlawng Sihhmui kaiah neih tura ruahman a ni.

Fisheries Department hian a hmain kumtina mumal taka Angling Events/Fish Festival calendar neih hi a lo rel tawh a, lian tham deuhin kumin 2026 atan hian March-April ah Tlawng Sihhmui leh Tut-Dapchhuah ahte hman nise, kumtawp lam September-October chhungin Tuichang-Keitum leh Tuipui South lamah te neih turin a duang chhin tawh a ni. Hemi dungzui hian tuna Tlawng-Sihhmui Nghakuai Chiah Runpui pawh hi tih tura rel a ni.

Registration fee hi ni khat atan Rs.500/- a ni ang a, online registration a tih theih bakah a hmunah pawh in register chawp theih a ni ang. Lawmman hi category hrang hrang hetiang hian siam a ni bawk ang:

1. Sangha man lian ber2. Sangha man tam ber3. Hmeichhia sangha man lian ber4. Sangha mantu upa ber5. Sangha mantu naupang ber

A ni khatna March ni 20 ah hian zing dar 6 atanga tlai dar 4:30pm thleng nghakuai hi chiah a ni ang a. A ni hnihna March ni 21 ah hian zing dar 6 atanga chawhnu dar 2 thleng chiah a ni leh ang a, dar 2pm ah hian Closing Function neih a ni ang. Nghakuai chiah chhung hian balu lak pawh khap a ni dawn lova, mahse fimkhur deuha lak nise tih a ni. A hmunah hian sangha man ve lo tan lei tur lo zuar se tih a ni bawk.

Heng events te hi sangha humhalh chungchanga mipui inzirtirna inpekna hmanrua atan hman thin nise tih a ni a. YMA lamten sangha an humhalhna avanga an thawh hahna te tarlan bakah lui a sangha te leh nungchate  hi Fisheries Department a phalna la lova man theih a ni lo tih pawh uar lehzuala inzirtir nise tih a ni.

Attachment

title: ICFRE-BRC Aizawl Organizes Two-Day Green Skills Training on Composting and Apiculture
content:
534/2025-2026

AIZAWL, MARCH 5, 2026: The ICFRE-Bamboo and Rattan Centre (BRC), Aizawl,  kicked off a comprehensive two-dayGreen Skills Training-Introduction to Composting and Apicultureprogram today scheduled from 05 to 06 March, 2026 under the Van Vigyan Kendra (VVK) Aizawl. The training is attended by 20 enthusiastic participants from the Bethlehem Vengthlang locality of Aizawl. The two-day training will include technical sessions and practical demonstrations designed to equip the trainees with the tools necessary to start their own composting and beekeeping units.

Inaugural Highlights

The session commenced with a welcome address byShri Sandeep Yadav, Scientist-D & Head of ICFRE-BRC. He provided a detailed briefing on the Center’s ongoing activities and its commitment to fostering sustainable livelihoods through scientific interventions.

Joining the inaugural session via video conferencing,Dr. Nitin Kulkarni, Director of ICFRE-Rain Forest Research Institute (RFRI), Jorhat, delivered a keynote address emphasizing the ecological synergy between waste management and agriculture.

TheChief Guest, Shri JH Lalbiakliana, CEO of the Mizoram Khadi and Village Industries Board (MKVIB), elaborated on the board's extensive work in apiculture training. He noted that:

Guest of Honor, Pi PC Vanlalpeki, Local Council Member of Bethlehem Vengthlang, encouraged the participants to view these green skills as a gateway to financial independence. She remarked on the growing importance of self-employment opportunities in the modern economy through specialized skill acquisition.

The inaugural program concluded with a formal vote of thanks delivered byShri Subhaprada Behera, Scientist-B, ICFRE-BRC, who expressed gratitude to the dignitaries and participants for their commitment to sustainable environmental practices.

Attachment

title: ICFRE-BRC Aizawl ah Khuai khawi leh Leitha siam dan inzirtirna hun hmang
content:
4698/2025-2026

AIZAWL, MARCH 5, 2026: ICFRE-Bamboo and Rattan Centre (BRC), Aizawl, ah Ni hnih-awh tur training,Green Skills Training-Introduction to Composting and Apiculturetih chu vawiin khan tan a ni. He training ah hian Bethlehem Vengthlang Local Council huamchhung a mi thlan chhuah bik mi 20 te tel in, ei bang ningnawi leh bawlhhlawh tawih thei a tang a leitha siam dan leh khuai khawi dan inzirtirna hun hman a ni.Pu Sandeep Yadav, Scientist-D & Head, ICFRE-BRCchuan kalkhawmte lawm na thu sawiin,Pu JH Lalbiakliana,CEO,Mizoram Khadi and Village Industries Board (MKVIB), Govt of Mizoramchu khuallian niin,Pi PC Vanlalpeki, Treasurer, Local Council Bethlehem Vengthlangchu khual zahawm a ni bawk.He hun hiDr. Nitin Kulkarni, Director, ICFRE-RFRI,Jorhatchuan Online hmangin a telpui bawk.

Khuallian chuan thusawiin, Sorkar hmalakna(Hand holding Policy)kal mek ah khuai khawi chu tel in, eizawnna tha zawk leh rintlak zawk siam turin Sorkar chuan hma a la mek tih sawiin, hralh chhuah dan tur ah pawh mumal zawk a kalpui dan tur ruahmanna siam mek a nih thu a sawi. Pi PC Vanlalpeki pawhin thusawina hun hmang in, kalkhawm te chu eizawnna tlak thiamna paw chhuak tur leh training te chhawr tangkai thiam tur a fuih in, duhsakna a hlan bawk. Director, Pu Nitin Kulkarni pawhin thusawina hun hmang in, mumal zawk a bawlhhlawh sawngbawl a pawimawh thu leh Agriculture a hmasawnna a thlen hrang hrang te sawiin, kan ram leilung chereu zel tur venna kawngah bawlhhlawh sawngbawl dan dik in kawngro tam tak a sut thu a sawi bawk.

PuSubhaprada Behera, Scientist-B, ICFRE-BRC,chuan lawmthu sawiin, he hun hi a khar a. Training ah hian mithiam thlan chhuah ten practical leh theory in zirtirna hun an hmang ang.

Attachment

title: CENTRAL HOTU LIANIN PM SHRI SCHOOL A TLAWH
content:
4697/2025-2026

5th March, 2026:Vawiin khan Central Sorkar-in State leh UT-a Prime Minister School for Rising India (PM SHRI) School te tlawh chhuak tura ruahmanna a siam angin Central Nodal Officer (CNO-PM SHRI) Pu Lalchhandama, Joint Secretary, Ministry of Rural Development, Govt.of India chuan Serchhip District hnuaia a PM SHRI School te a tlawh.

Pu Lal Chhandama chuan PM SHRI Govt Buangpui Primary School, PM SHRI Govt Khawlailung Primary School-II, PM SHRI Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya, Thenzawl, Serchhip District chu an School hmunah theuh a tlawh a. PM SHRI School atana hmalakna awm zawng zawng te chip chiar takin a enfiah a, Zirtirtute kawm nghal bawk.

Pu Lalchhandama hi Pu Malsawmtluanga Jt.Secretary, School Education Department, Govt. of Mizoram,  Pu Andrew Lalrintluanga Dy. State Project Director, Samagra Shiksha, Mizoram leh Serchhip Dist a Official ten an tawiawm. Pu Lalchhandama  hian vawi tlai vek  khan DC Serchhip  chu meeting a neih pui a, Serchhip District chhunga PM SHRI School te hmasawn zel na tur a sawi pui bawk.

Attachment

title: Hnahthial Bawrhsap chuan African Swine Fever avangin khuahkhirhna thupek a chhuah
content:
4696/2025-2026

Hnahthial, 5th March, 2026 :

(Under Section 163 of Bhartiya Naqarik Suraksha Sanhita, 2023)

Mizoram hmun hrang hrangah Vawk pul hri African Swine Fever (ASF) leng te a zia awm ta deuh a hriat a ni a. Amaherawhchu, khua a Io thal chhoh leh tak avangin he hri len theihna chance pawh a sang chho leh ta hle a, Hnahthial District chu he hri atanga kan Io him theihna turin khuahkhirhna chhuah chhunzawm a Io tul leh ta a.

Chuvangin, kei,K.VANLALRUATI, District Magistrate, Hnahthial DistricthianSection 163 of Bhartiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita, 2023in thuneihna min pek angin a hnuaia mi ang hian thupek ka ti chhuak e:

He thupek zawm Io chuSection 223 of Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita, 2023dan hmangin hrem theih a ni ang. He thupek hian tul bik thila tihdanglam a nih loh chuan tihchhuah a nih atangathia 2 (hnih)chhung a huam ang.

He thupek hi Seal neminVawiin,27thFebruary, 2026hian hming ka ziah hnan e.

Attachment
